headline: Victor Muñoz — update
body: 🚨🔴 Victor Muñoz to Liverpool set to be finalised and announced this week. All done and sealed. Liverpool are activating €40m release clause. #LFC ⚠️ Understand Liverpool still want to sign at least one more top winger. Yan Diomande remains
text:
🚨🔴 Victor Muñoz to Liverpool set to be finalised and announced this week. 

All done and sealed. Liverpool are activating €40m release clause. #LFC

⚠️ Understand Liverpool still want to sign at least one more top winger. Yan Diomande remains dream target, as revealed, but deal is very difficult as Oliver Mintzlaff and Jürgen Klopp do not want to sell.

22 y/o winger Munoz from Osasuna was a desired target for Andoni Iraola.

@SkySportDE 🇪🇸
